untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires multi-bar trend line analysis (lead-in phase duration ≥1 month, bump phase angle deepening to 60+ degrees, rounded turn formation, bump height ratio comparison to lead-in height). These geometric/structural pattern properties cannot be expressed using the allowed point-in-time indicators. The signal requires historical trend line fitting, angle measurement, and multi-phase pattern detection which are not supported by the available indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using volume confirmation and price action reversal as proxy signals. However, the core Frying Pan Base / Bump pattern definition is fundamentally a multi-bar structural pattern that requires trend line analysis, geometric measurements, and phase identification across 1+ month periods. Standard technical indicators cannot capture the specific pattern geometry described (60-degree trend line, rounded turn, bump-to-lead-in height ratio of 2x). A dedicated pattern recognition module would be required for full implementation.
